vibe: High-end, sophisticated developer tool with an editorial aesthetic. Combining the deep, moody atmospherics of a premium dark mode app with elegant serif typography and precise monospace details.

rules.headings_font_weight: Use font-medium or font-normal for Playfair Display. Do NOT use font-bold for headings. Let the serif do the talking.
rules.code_blocks: Use IBM Plex Mono. No ligatures. Keep it raw and precise.

layout.workspace_pane: Split pane layout using flex or grid with a strict 1px border separator (border-border). No gap between panes. Left chat (col-span-1 or 300px), Right Editor (flex-1).

surfaces_and_effects.buttons: Solid pill (rounded-full). Primary uses brand-primary background with text-inverse. Hover effect: slight scale up and bg color lighten. Do not use border for primary buttons.
surfaces_and_effects.cards: Flat dark surfaces (bg-surface) with 1px border. On hover, use the 'Tracing Beam' effect or a soft glow (shadow-glow) in the brand color.
surfaces_and_effects.inputs: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-brand-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-primary/50 text-primary transition-all rounded-lg p-3

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must transition colors smoothly (duration-300). Links get a subtle underline that expands from left to right. Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and their borders brighten.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Code typing simulation for the hero section AI demo. Subtle pulsing glow on the 'AI thinking' indicator.

components_strategy.navigation: Floating sticky header, glassmorphism surface. High contrast logo. Links are clean text.
components_strategy.editor_tabs: Minimalist text tabs with no background. Active tab has a bottom border (brand-primary) and text-primary. Inactive tabs are text-secondary.
components_strategy.code_preview: Mocked IDE interface with file tree on the left of the pane, line numbers, and syntax highlighting colors that pop against the deep dark background.
components_strategy.chat_interface: User messages right-aligned (muted brand-primary bg), AI messages left-aligned (glassmorphism bg). Minimalist input area at bottom.
components_strategy.data_testid: Apply data-testid to all interactive and key informational elements.

images.description: Transparent, geometric shapes float on a black background. Used for high-end landing page.
Man typing on laptop at night. Use with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80).
Black flat screen computer monitor. Good for product context section.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a finer, more elegant look to match the serif typography.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end AI developer SaaS. Avoid all 'neo-brutalist' tropes (no hard shadows, no heavy borders, no red/white stark contrasts).
Use Playfair Display for all main headings (H1, H2, H3) and Outfit for body text.
Implement the workspace view using a full height (h-screen) split layout with a 1px border separator. No padding around the split panes to give it a true IDE feel.
For the landing page, use massive negative space. Wrap hero sections in container with heavy padding.
All interactive elements must include data-testid.
Ensure color contrast is maintained. The text must be highly readable against the #050505 background.
Use the provided image URLs as backgrounds with a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-black/60) to maintain text legibility.
